sn43.12:1.1: “Monks, I will teach you the unfabricated and the path leading to the unfabricated.
sn43.12:1.2: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.” “As you say, lord,” the monks responded to the Blessed One. The Blessed One said,
sn43.12:1.4: Whatever is the ending of passion, the ending of aversion, the ending of delusion:
sn43.12:1.6: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:1.8: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated.
sn43.12:1.9: Thus, monks, I have taught you the unfabricated and the path leading to the unfabricated.
sn43.12:1.10: Whatever a sympathetic teacher should do—seeking the welfare of his disciples, out of sympathy for them—that have I done for you.
sn43.12:1.11: Over there are the roots of trees; over there, empty dwellings. Practice jhāna, monks. Don’t be heedless. Don’t later fall into remorse. This is our message to you all.”
sn43.12:2.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:3.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:3.4: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:3.5: Concentration without directed thought and with a modicum of evaluation…
sn43.12:3.7: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:3.8: Concentration without directed thought and without evaluation…
sn43.12:4.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:4.4: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:4.7: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:5.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:5.2: There is the case where a monk remains focused on the body in & of itself—ardent, alert, & mindful—subduing greed & distress with reference to the world.
sn43.12:5.3: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:5.4: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:5.5: There is the case where a monk remains focused on feelings in & of themselves—ardent, alert, & mindful—subduing greed & distress with reference to the world.
sn43.12:5.6: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:5.7: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:5.8: There is the case where a monk remains focused on the mind in & of itself—ardent, alert, & mindful—subduing greed & distress with reference to the world.
sn43.12:5.9: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:5.10: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:5.11: There is the case where a monk remains focused on mental qualities in & of themselves—ardent, alert, & mindful—subduing greed & distress with reference to the world. This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:6.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:6.2: There is the case where a monk generates desire, endeavors, activates persistence, upholds & exerts his intent for the sake of the non-arising of evil, unskillful qualities that have not yet arisen.
sn43.12:6.3: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:6.4: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:6.5: There is the case where a monk generates desire, endeavors, activates persistence, upholds & exerts his intent for the sake of the abandoning of evil, unskillful qualities that have arisen.
sn43.12:6.6: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:6.7: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:6.8: There is the case where a monk generates desire, endeavors, activates persistence, upholds & exerts his intent for the sake of the arising of skillful qualities that have not yet arisen.
sn43.12:6.9: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:6.10: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:6.11: There is the case where a monk generates desire, endeavors, activates persistence, upholds & exerts his intent for the maintenance, non-confusion, increase, plenitude, development, & culmination of skillful qualities that have arisen. This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:7.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:7.2: There is the case where a monk develops the base of power endowed with concentration founded on desire & the fabrications of exertion.
sn43.12:7.3: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:7.4: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:7.5: There is the case where a monk develops the base of power endowed with concentration founded on persistence & the fabrications of exertion.
sn43.12:7.6: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:7.7: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:7.8: There is the case where a monk develops the base of power endowed with concentration founded on intent & the fabrications of exertion.
sn43.12:7.9: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:7.10: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:7.11: There is the case where a monk develops the base of power endowed with concentration founded on discrimination & the fabrications of exertion. This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:8.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:8.2: There is the case where a monk develops the faculty of conviction dependent on seclusion, dependent on dispassion, dependent on cessation, resulting in letting go.
sn43.12:8.3: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:8.4: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:8.5: There is the case where a monk develops the faculty of persistence…
sn43.12:8.14: discernment dependent on seclusion, dependent on dispassion, dependent on cessation, resulting in letting go. This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:9.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:9.2: There is the case where a monk develops the strength of conviction…
sn43.12:9.14: discernment dependent on seclusion, dependent on dispassion, dependent on cessation, resulting in letting go. This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:10.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:10.2: There is the case where a monk develops mindfulness as a factor for awakening…
sn43.12:10.5: analysis of qualities as a factor for awakening…
sn43.12:10.6: persistence as a factor for awakening…
sn43.12:10.7: rapture as a factor for awakening…
sn43.12:10.8: calm as a factor for awakening…
sn43.12:10.9: concentration as a factor for awakening…
sn43.12:10.10: equanimity as a factor for awakening dependent on seclusion, dependent on dispassion, dependent on cessation, resulting in letting go. This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:11.1: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:11.2: There is the case where a monk develops right view…
sn43.12:11.10: right mindfulness dependent on seclusion, dependent on dispassion, dependent on cessation, resulting in letting go. This is called the path leading to the unfabricated…
sn43.12:11.14: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.12:11.15: There is the case where a monk develops right concentration dependent on seclusion, dependent on dispassion, dependent on cessation, resulting in letting go.
sn43.12:11.16: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated.
sn43.12:11.17: Thus, monks, I have taught you the unfabricated and the path leading to the unfabricated.
sn43.12:11.18: Whatever a sympathetic teacher should do—seeking the welfare of his disciples, out of sympathy for them—that have I done for you.
sn43.12:11.19: Over there are the roots of trees; over there, empty dwellings. Practice jhāna, monks. Don’t be heedless. Don’t later fall into regret. This is our message to you.”
